summary: Matched four previously stubbed Yoshi neutral-special functions in src/melee/ft/chara/ftYoshi/ftYs_SpecialN.c. The PR replaced placeholder markers for ftYs_SpecialN1_Anim, ftYs_SpecialN1_Phys, ftYs_SpecialN1_0_Phys, and ftYs_SpecialAirN1_1_Phys with simple wrappers around shared fighter animation/physics helpers, adding ft/ft_0892.h for the newly used ft_8008A2BC declaration. The decomp.dev report confirmed 4 new 100% matches totaling +156 bytes.
what_changed: Implemented ftYs_SpecialN1_Anim(ftYs_GObj* gobj): declares a local u8 _[8] padding/temp array noted as needed to bring the function to full match, checks ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining, and calls ft_8008A2BC when no frames remain.
Implemented ftYs_SpecialN1_Phys(ftYs_GObj* gobj) as a direct call to ft_80084F3C after casting to Fighter_GObj*.
Implemented ftYs_SpecialN1_0_Phys(ftYs_GObj* gobj) as another direct call to ft_80084F3C after casting to Fighter_GObj*.
Implemented ftYs_SpecialAirN1_1_Phys(ftYs_GObj* gobj) as a direct call to ft_80084EEC after casting to Fighter_GObj*.
Replaced four decomp placeholder comments with matching C implementations.
smart_moves: Recognized that several Yoshi SpecialN physics callbacks were thin wrappers over common fighter physics helpers rather than unique per-character logic.
Used explicit casts from ftYs_GObj* to Fighter_GObj* to satisfy shared helper signatures while preserving the character-specific callback names.
Added the precise missing header for ft_8008A2BC instead of relying on undeclared functions or broad includes.
Kept the ftYs_SpecialN1_Anim implementation minimal: frame-end check plus transition helper call, matching the common animation-callback pattern.
Used a local u8 _[8] padding array with an explanatory comment to force a full match where stack/layout behavior required it.
decomp_lessons: For fighter action callbacks, check whether the target function is only a wrapper around common animation or physics helpers before assuming unique character logic.
Ground and air/state-variant physics functions may share identical bodies; duplicate tiny wrappers can be the correct match when the action table expects separate symbol names.
Animation callbacks often use ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining(...) == 0 as the terminal-frame branch and then call a transition/end helper.
Small local dummy arrays may be necessary to reproduce stack allocation and achieve full matching, but should be documented as matching scaffolding.
When matching character-specific GObj typedefs, explicit casts to Fighter_GObj* are a practical pattern for calling shared ft_* helpers.
naming_conventions: Yoshi neutral-special functions use the ftYs_SpecialN prefix.
Animation callbacks carry the _Anim suffix, e.g. ftYs_SpecialN1_Anim.
Physics callbacks carry the _Phys suffix, e.g. ftYs_SpecialN1_Phys and ftYs_SpecialAirN1_1_Phys.
Air-state variants use SpecialAirN in the symbol name, while ground variants use SpecialN.
State subvariants are encoded numerically in the symbol name, such as N1, N1_0, and AirN1_1.
Character-specific object typedef ftYs_GObj* is used at the public callback boundary, with casts to Fighter_GObj* for common helpers.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Matched ftYs_SpecialN1_Anim by introducing a dummy stack local: u8 _[8]; with comment 'brought to full match'.
Used direct wrapper bodies for short physics functions, minimizing control flow to a single common-helper call.
Preserved exact comparison style in animation callback: ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining((Fighter_GObj*) gobj) == 0.
Added the missing helper declaration include rather than changing function signatures or introducing local declarations.
Decomp.dev reported 4 functions moved from 0.00% to 100.00%: ftYs_SpecialN1_Anim (+60 bytes), ftYs_SpecialN1_Phys (+32), ftYs_SpecialN1_0_Phys (+32), and ftYs_SpecialAirN1_1_Phys (+32).
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the provided slice.
Automated decomp.dev feedback confirmed matched code remained at 32.14% overall but gained +156 matched bytes and 4 new full matches for GALE01.
follow_up_queries: Find remaining placeholder functions in src/melee/ft/chara/ftYoshi/ftYs_SpecialN.c near ftYs_SpecialAirN1_0_Anim, ftYs_SpecialAirN2_0_Anim, ftYs_SpecialAirN1_0_Phys, ftYs_SpecialN1_1_Phys, ftYs_SpecialAirN1_2_Phys, and ftYs_SpecialN2_1_Phys.
Search other fighter SpecialN files for animation callbacks using ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining followed by ft_8008A2BC.
Search for physics callbacks that are one-line wrappers around ft_80084F3C or ft_80084EEC to reuse this matching pattern.
Investigate whether other small unmatched callbacks need dummy local arrays to reproduce stack layout.
